context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 26 Cleanup & Canonicalization fully verified. Key findings: (1) Deregistered routes return 404: /api/admin/settings/company, /api/admin/branding-settings, /api/admin/settings-hub, (2) Canonical route /api/admin/business-settings returns 200, (3) /api/admin/business-settings/public returns company data without auth, (4) Frontend redirects work: /admin/products-services → /admin/catalog, /admin/catalog-taxonomy → /admin/catalog, /admin/vendor-capabilities → /admin/vendors, (5) Admin sidebar has NO forbidden items (Products & Services, Catalog Taxonomy, Vendor Capabilities), (6) Admin sidebar has all required items (Catalog Workspace, Supply Review, Vendors, Vendor Onboarding, Margins), (7) Customer sidebar has all canonical items (Dashboard, Marketplace, Services, My Orders, Quotes, Invoices, Recurring Plans, Referrals & Rewards, My Statement, My Account, Help), (8) Marketplace search returns approved products, (9) Product detail page at /account/marketplace/{id} works, (10) Vendor supply review at /admin/vendor-supply-review works.
